description: Modern Real-World Workflow Examples - 20+ common business automation scenarios for AI model training

workflows.use_case: Sales & Lead Qualification Agent - Automates lead qualification, follow-ups, and meeting scheduling

step3.systemPrompt: Create an intelligent sales agent workflow that qualifies leads, sends follow-up emails, and schedules meetings automatically.

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → AI Agent (qualify lead) → If/Else (qualified?) → [True: Send email + Schedule meeting, False: Log to CRM]

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are a sales qualification agent. Analyze the lead data and determine if they are qualified based on: budget, authority, need, and timeline (BANT). Return JSON with qualified: true/false and reasoning.

google_gmail.subject: Thank you for your interest - Let's schedule a call
google_gmail.body: Hi {{$json.name}}, based on your requirements, I'd like to schedule a personalized demo. Please choose a time that works for you.

executionLoop.reasoning: New lead received via webhook, need to qualify using AI agent
executionLoop.execution: Executing ai_agent node to qualify lead

executionLoop.reasoning: Lead is qualified, sending personalized email and scheduling meeting

actions.purpose: Qualify lead using AI analysis (BANT framework)
Branch workflow based on qualification result
Send personalized follow-up email to qualified leads
Schedule demo meeting for qualified leads
Log all leads to CRM with qualification status

ai_usage.input: Lead data (name, email, company, requirements, budget)

error_handling: Fallback to manual review if AI qualification fails
constraints: CRM logging is mandatory for all leads

metadata.business_value: Reduces manual lead qualification time by 80%, increases conversion rate by 30%

workflows.use_case: Customer Support Agent - Handles FAQs, tickets, refunds, order status, and escalates to humans when needed

step3.systemPrompt: Create an intelligent customer support agent that answers FAQs, handles tickets, processes refunds, checks order status, and escalates complex issues to human agents.

keySteps: Check if answer exists in knowledge base

structure.flowType: Complex flow with multiple conditional branches
structure.description: Trigger: webhook → AI Agent (analyze inquiry) → If/Else (can answer?) → [True: Send response, False: Check ticket system] → If/Else (needs escalation?) → [True: Create ticket + Notify team, False: Process request]

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are a customer support agent. Analyze the customer inquiry and determine: 1) Can you answer this from knowledge base? 2) What type of request is this? (refund, order_status, complaint, question) 3) Does this need human escalation? Return JSON with can_answer: boolean, request_type: string, needs_escalation: boolean, suggested_response: string.

database_read.query: SELECT answer FROM faq_knowledge_base WHERE question LIKE '%{{$json.customerMessage}}%' LIMIT 1

google_gmail.subject: Re: Your inquiry - Ticket #{{$json.ticketId}}
google_gmail.body: {{$json.suggested_response || $json.ai_response}}

executionLoop.reasoning: Customer inquiry received, analyzing with AI agent to determine best response
executionLoop.execution: Executing ai_agent node to analyze customer inquiry

executionLoop.reasoning: AI can answer this inquiry, checking knowledge base for accurate response
executionLoop.execution: Executing database_read to fetch FAQ answer

executionLoop.reasoning: Answer found, sending response to customer

actions.purpose: Analyze customer inquiry and determine response strategy
Branch based on whether AI can answer or needs escalation
Fetch FAQ answers from knowledge base
Process refunds and order status checks
Create support ticket for escalated issues
Notify support team of new tickets

ai_usage.purpose: Analyze customer inquiries, determine response strategy, and generate appropriate responses
ai_usage.input: Customer message, customer history, order information

error_handling: Retry failed API calls with exponential backoff
Fallback to human agent if AI confidence is low
Log all errors to monitoring system
Send error notifications to support team
constraints: All customer inquiries must receive a response
Tickets must be created for escalated issues
Response time must be under 2 minutes
Refunds can only be processed for orders within 30 days

metadata.business_value: Reduces support cost by 50-70%, provides 24/7 availability, handles 80% of common inquiries automatically

workflows.goal: create an HR hiring workflow agent
workflows.use_case: HR / Hiring Workflow Agent - Automates resume screening, candidate shortlisting, interview scheduling, and answers candidate queries

step1.userPrompt: create an HR hiring workflow agent

step3.systemPrompt: Create an intelligent HR hiring workflow agent that screens resumes, shortlists candidates, schedules interviews, and answers candidate queries automatically.

requirements.primaryGoal: create an HR hiring workflow agent

structure.flowType: Complex flow with AI analysis and conditional processing
structure.description: Trigger: form → AI Agent (extract resume data) → AI Agent (screen resume) → If/Else (qualified?) → [True: Shortlist + Schedule interview + Send email, False: Reject + Send email] → Store in ATS

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are an HR screening agent. Extract key information from the resume: name, email, skills, experience, education. Then evaluate if the candidate matches the job requirements. Return JSON with: extracted_data: {name, email, skills[], experience_years, education}, match_score: number (0-100), qualified: boolean, reasoning: string, recommended_interview_type: string.

google_gmail.subject: {{$json.qualified ? 'Interview Scheduled - ' + $json.position : 'Application Update - ' + $json.position}}
google_gmail.body: {{$json.qualified ? 'Dear ' + $json.name + ', Congratulations! We would like to schedule an interview with you. Interview details: ' + $json.interview_slot : 'Dear ' + $json.name + ', Thank you for your interest. Unfortunately, we are not moving forward with your application at this time.'}}

executionLoop.reasoning: New job application received, extracting resume data using AI agent
executionLoop.execution: Executing ai_agent node to extract and screen resume
executionLoop.stateUpdated: Resume extracted and screened: match_score=85, qualified=true

executionLoop.reasoning: Candidate is qualified, scheduling interview and sending confirmation
executionLoop.execution: Executing google_calendar, google_gmail, and airtable nodes

actions.purpose: Extract resume data and evaluate candidate match against job requirements
Branch workflow based on qualification result
Send confirmation or rejection email to candidate
Store candidate data in ATS system

ai_usage.purpose: Resume extraction, skill matching, and candidate qualification
ai_usage.input: Resume file/content, job requirements, job description

error_handling: Fallback to manual review if AI confidence is low
Log parsing errors to monitoring system
Send error notifications to HR team
constraints: Interview slots must be at least 2 days in advance
All applications must be logged in ATS
Rejected candidates must receive email notification

metadata.business_value: Saves HR 80% manual effort, reduces hiring cycle time by 60%, processes 10x more applications

workflows.use_case: CRM Agent - Automates customer data management, lead tracking, contact creation, deal pipeline management, and customer communication

step3.systemPrompt: Create an intelligent CRM agent workflow that manages customer interactions, tracks leads, creates contacts, updates deals, and sends automated communications.

keySteps: Check if contact exists in CRM
Create or update contact in CRM

structure.flowType: Complex flow with conditional logic and CRM operations
structure.description: Trigger: form → AI Agent (extract & validate data) → If/Else (contact exists?) → [True: Update contact, False: Create contact] → If/Else (qualified lead?) → [True: Create deal + Send email, False: Log to CRM] → Update pipeline

ai_agent.userInput:
Customer Data: {{$json}}

Extract and validate customer information, determine if this is a qualified lead.
ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are a CRM data processing agent. Extract customer information from the form data: name, email, company, phone, message. Validate email format and phone number. Determine if this is a qualified lead based on: company size (if mentioned), message content (shows interest), and completeness of data. Return JSON with: extracted_data: {name, email, company, phone, message}, is_qualified: boolean, lead_score: number (0-100), contact_exists: boolean (check if email exists), recommended_action: string (create_contact|update_contact|create_deal).

google_gmail.subject: {{$json.is_qualified ? 'Thank you for your interest - Let's connect!' : 'Thank you for contacting us'}}
google_gmail.body: {{$json.is_qualified ? 'Dear ' + $json.name + ', Thank you for your interest. Our team will reach out to discuss how we can help your business.' : 'Dear ' + $json.name + ', Thank you for contacting us. We have received your message and will get back to you soon.'}}

executionLoop.reasoning: New customer/lead data received via form, extracting and validating information using AI agent
executionLoop.execution: Executing ai_agent node to extract and validate customer data
executionLoop.stateUpdated: Data extracted: email validated, lead_score=75, is_qualified=true

executionLoop.reasoning: Customer data validated, checking if contact exists in CRM
executionLoop.execution: Executing javascript to check contact existence
executionLoop.stateUpdated: Contact does not exist, will create new contact

executionLoop.reasoning: Contact does not exist, creating new contact in CRM and deal if qualified
executionLoop.execution: Executing hubspot/zoho_crm to create contact and deal

executionLoop.reasoning: Contact and deal created, sending automated follow-up email and logging to sheets

actions.purpose: Extract and validate customer data, determine lead qualification
Check if contact exists and determine CRM actions
Branch based on whether contact exists
Create or update contact and deal in HubSpot CRM
Create or update contact and deal in Zoho CRM
Send automated follow-up email to customer
Log all CRM activities for tracking and reporting

ai_usage.purpose: Extract customer data, validate information, determine lead qualification, and recommend CRM actions
ai_usage.input: Form data (name, email, company, phone, message)

error_handling: Retry failed CRM API calls with exponential backoff
Fallback to manual review if data validation fails
Log all errors to monitoring system
Send error notifications to sales team
Validate email format before creating contact
constraints: All contacts must be created in CRM
Qualified leads (lead_score >= 70) must have deals created
All activities must be logged to Google Sheets
Follow-up emails must be sent within 5 minutes

metadata.business_value: Automates 90% of CRM data entry, reduces manual work by 80%, ensures data consistency, improves lead response time by 95%

workflows.use_case: Lead Capture and Assignment - Enriches lead data, assigns to sales rep based on territory, and sends welcome email

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that captures leads from forms, enriches lead data with company information, assigns leads to appropriate sales reps based on territory or lead source, and sends welcome emails.

keySteps: Capture lead from web form or email
Assign to sales rep based on territory

structure.description: Trigger: form → AI Agent (enrich data) → HubSpot (create lead + assign) → Google Gmail (send welcome)

ai_agent.userInput:
Lead Data: {{$json}}

Enrich this lead with company information and determine territory assignment.
ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are a lead enrichment agent. Given lead data (name, email, company, phone), enrich it with: company_size (Small|Medium|Large|Enterprise), industry (if company name suggests it), territory (based on company location or industry). Return JSON with: enriched_data: {name, email, company, phone, company_size, industry, territory}, assigned_rep: string (rep name based on territory).

google_gmail.subject: Welcome! Thank you for your interest
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.name}}, Thank you for reaching out. Our sales representative {{$json.assigned_rep}} will be in touch with you shortly.

actions.purpose: Enrich lead data with company information
Create lead and assign to sales rep

workflows.use_case: Lead Qualification BANT - Collects Budget, Authority, Need, Timeline and qualifies leads

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that prompts sales reps to collect BANT criteria (Budget, Authority, Need, Timeline) and automatically qualifies leads when all criteria are met.

keySteps: Trigger when lead status updated to Contacted
Prompt rep to collect BANT criteria
Evaluate if all BANT criteria met
Move to Qualified and create opportunity if qualified

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → AI Agent (evaluate BANT) → If/Else (all criteria met?) → [True: Update to Qualified + Create Opportunity, False: Keep in Contacted]

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are a BANT qualification agent. Evaluate if the lead meets all BANT criteria: Budget (has budget allocated), Authority (decision maker involved), Need (clear business need), Timeline (purchase timeline defined). Return JSON with: bant_complete: boolean, budget_met: boolean, authority_met: boolean, need_met: boolean, timeline_met: boolean, qualified: boolean (all must be true), qualification_score: number (0-100).

actions.purpose: Update lead status and create opportunity

workflows.use_case: New Customer Onboarding - Automates customer record creation, assigns onboarding specialist, sends welcome kit, and schedules kick-off call

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automatically onboards new customers when a deal is closed won, including creating customer records, assigning specialists, sending welcome materials, and scheduling calls.

keySteps: Trigger when opportunity marked Closed Won

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → HubSpot (create customer) → Assign specialist → Google Gmail (welcome email) → Google Calendar (schedule call) → Google Sheets (create tasks)

google_gmail.subject: Welcome! Let's get you started
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.name}}, Welcome! Your onboarding specialist {{$json.specialist}} will be in touch shortly. We've scheduled a kick-off call for you.

workflows.use_case: Support Ticket Creation and Routing - Creates tickets from emails/forms, categorizes by issue type, and assigns to appropriate agents

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that creates support tickets from customer emails or web forms, categorizes them by issue type using AI, assigns to appropriate support agents, and sends auto-reply with ticket number.

keySteps: Receive customer email or form submission

structure.description: Trigger: form → AI Agent (categorize) → Zendesk (create ticket + assign) → Google Gmail (auto-reply) → Slack (notify team)

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are a support ticket routing agent. Analyze the customer support request and categorize it by: issue_type (Technical|Billing|Account|Feature Request|Bug), priority (Low|Medium|High|Urgent), category (specific subcategory). Also determine the best agent assignment based on issue type. Return JSON with: issue_type, priority, category, assigned_agent: string, estimated_resolution_time: string.

google_gmail.subject: Re: {{$json.subject}} - Ticket #{{$json.ticketId}}
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.name}}, We have received your support request. Ticket #{{$json.ticketId}} has been created and assigned to our {{$json.issue_type}} team. We will respond within {{$json.estimated_resolution_time}}.

workflows.use_case: Candidate Application Screening - Automatically screens resumes, rejects if must-have skills missing, and notifies recruiter

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that screens job applications, parses resumes, automatically rejects candidates missing must-have skills, and moves qualified candidates to screening stage with recruiter notification.

keySteps: Move to Screening and notify recruiter if qualified

structure.description: Trigger: form → AI Agent (parse resume) → If/Else (has must-have skills?) → [True: Move to Screening + Notify recruiter, False: Auto-reject + Send email]

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are a resume screening agent. Parse the resume and extract: skills (array), experience_years (number), education (string), has_must_have_skills (boolean - check if all required skills from job requirements are present). Return JSON with: extracted_data: {name, email, skills[], experience_years, education}, has_must_have_skills: boolean, match_score: number (0-100), qualified: boolean.

google_gmail.subject: {{$json.qualified ? 'Application Received - ' + $json.position : 'Application Update - ' + $json.position}}
google_gmail.body: {{$json.qualified ? 'Dear ' + $json.name + ', Thank you for your application. We are reviewing your qualifications and will be in touch soon.' : 'Dear ' + $json.name + ', Thank you for your interest. Unfortunately, we are not moving forward with your application at this time.'}}

actions.purpose: Parse resume and check must-have skills

workflows.use_case: New Hire Onboarding Tasks - Automates IT account creation, equipment ordering, buddy assignment, and orientation scheduling when offer is accepted

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automatically creates onboarding tasks when an offer is accepted, including IT account setup, equipment ordering, buddy assignment, orientation scheduling, and pre-boarding emails.

structure.flowType: Linear flow with multiple onboarding tasks
structure.description: Trigger: webhook → Airtable (create tasks) → Google Gmail (pre-boarding email) → Google Calendar (schedule orientation) → Google Sheets (track progress) → Slack (notify team)

google_gmail.subject: Welcome! Pre-boarding Information
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.name}}, Welcome to the team! Your start date is {{$json.startDate}}. We've assigned {{$json.buddy}} as your onboarding buddy. Orientation is scheduled for {{$json.orientationDate}}.

slack_message.message: 🎉 New hire onboarding started for {{$json.name}} ({{$json.position}}). Start date: {{$json.startDate}}. Onboarding buddy: {{$json.buddy}}

workflows.use_case: Opportunity Stage Progression - Updates forecast, notifies manager for large deals, and schedules follow-up tasks when opportunity stage changes

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that monitors opportunity stage changes, updates forecast amounts, notifies managers for deals over $50K, and schedules follow-up tasks for sales reps.

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → HubSpot (update forecast) → If/Else (deal > $50K?) → [True: Notify manager + Slack, False: Continue] → Schedule follow-up task

google_gmail.subject: Large Deal Alert - {{$json.dealName}}
google_gmail.body: Deal {{$json.dealName}} has moved to {{$json.newStage}} stage. Amount: ${{$json.amount}}

workflows.use_case: Quote Approval - Sends approval requests for quotes over $10K, generates PDF if approved, and notifies rep if rejected

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automatically sends quote approval requests to sales managers for quotes over $10K, generates PDF and emails customer if approved, or notifies rep with comments if rejected.

keySteps: If approved: Generate PDF and email customer
If rejected: Notify rep with comments

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → If/Else (quote > $10K?) → [True: Send approval request] → If/Else (approved?) → [True: Generate PDF + Email, False: Notify rep]

google_gmail.subject: Quote Approval Required - ${{$json.quoteTotal}}
google_gmail.body: Quote #{{$json.quoteId}} requires approval. Amount: ${{$json.quoteTotal}}. Customer: {{$json.customerName}}

workflows.use_case: Customer Churn Risk Alert - Flags accounts at risk when no login for 60 days or support tickets spike, notifies customer success team

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that monitors customer activity, flags accounts as at-risk when no login for 60 days or support tickets spike, and notifies customer success team to schedule check-in calls.

keySteps: Check if no login for 60 days

structure.description: Trigger: schedule (daily) → Database Read (check activity) → AI Agent (analyze risk) → If/Else (at-risk?) → [True: Flag account + Notify team + Schedule call]

database_read.query: SELECT customer_id, last_login, ticket_count_30d FROM customers WHERE last_login < NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' OR ticket_count_30d > 10

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are a churn risk analysis agent. Analyze customer activity data: last_login (days ago), ticket_count_30d (support tickets in last 30 days), account_value. Determine churn_risk_score (0-100), is_at_risk (boolean), risk_factors (array of reasons), recommended_action (string). Return JSON with analysis.

google_gmail.subject: 🚨 Churn Risk Alert - {{$json.customerName}}
google_gmail.body: Customer {{$json.customerName}} is flagged as at-risk. Risk Score: {{$json.churn_risk_score}}. Factors: {{$json.risk_factors.join(', ')}}. Recommended action: {{$json.recommended_action}}

workflows.use_case: Customer Feedback Collection - Sends satisfaction surveys after ticket resolution, stores responses in CRM, and escalates low scores

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automatically sends customer satisfaction surveys (CSAT/NPS) after support tickets are resolved, stores responses in CRM, and notifies customer success manager if score is below 3.

keySteps: Notify CS manager if low score

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → Zendesk (get ticket) → Google Gmail (send survey) → Wait for response → HubSpot (store) → If/Else (score < 3?) → [True: Notify CS manager]

google_gmail.subject: How was your support experience?
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.customerName}}, We'd love your feedback on ticket #{{$json.ticketId}}. Please rate your experience: [Survey Link]

slack_message.message: ⚠️ Low CSAT Score: {{$json.customerName}} rated {{$json.surveyScore}}/5 for ticket #{{$json.ticketId}}

workflows.use_case: Interview Scheduling and Feedback - Sends availability link to candidates, schedules interviews with panel, and collects feedback after each round

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automates interview scheduling by sending availability links to candidates, coordinating with interview panel, scheduling calendar events, and collecting feedback forms after each interview round.

keySteps: Trigger when candidate moved to Interview stage

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → Google Gmail (send availability link) → Wait for response → Google Calendar (schedule) → Send invites → Create feedback form

google_gmail.subject: Interview Scheduling - {{$json.position}}
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.candidateName}}, Please select your availability for the {{$json.round}} interview: [Availability Link]

workflows.use_case: Employee Leave Request Approval - Checks leave balance, routes to manager for approval, updates calendar, and notifies payroll if unpaid

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that processes employee leave requests by checking remaining balance, forwarding to manager for approval, updating calendar, and notifying payroll if the leave is unpaid.

structure.description: Trigger: form → Database Read (check balance) → If/Else (has balance?) → [True: Send to manager] → If/Else (approved?) → [True: Update calendar + Notify payroll if unpaid]

database_read.query: SELECT remaining_leave_balance FROM employees WHERE employee_id = $1

google_gmail.subject: Leave Request Approval - {{$json.employeeName}}
google_gmail.body: {{$json.employeeName}} has requested {{$json.leaveType}} leave from {{$json.startDate}} to {{$json.endDate}}. Remaining balance: {{$json.remainingBalance}} days. [Approve] [Reject]

workflows.use_case: Renewal Reminder - Notifies account manager 60 days before contract renewal, creates renewal opportunity, and sends reminder email to customer

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that monitors contract renewal dates, notifies account managers 60 days before renewal, creates renewal opportunities, and sends reminder emails to customers.

keySteps: Schedule daily check for contracts expiring in 60 days

structure.description: Trigger: schedule (daily) → Database Read (find expiring contracts) → HubSpot (create opportunity) → Google Gmail (send reminder) → Slack (notify manager)

database_read.query: SELECT customer_id, customer_name, renewal_date, account_manager FROM contracts WHERE renewal_date BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '60 days'

google_gmail.subject: Contract Renewal Reminder - {{$json.customerName}}
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.contactName}}, Your contract with us is set to renew on {{$json.renewalDate}}. Let's schedule a call to discuss your renewal options.

slack_message.message: 🔄 Renewal Reminder: {{$json.customerName}} contract expires in 60 days ({{$json.renewalDate}}). Account Manager: {{$json.accountManager}}

workflows.use_case: Sales Meeting Follow-up - Sends thank-you email with meeting summary, adds task to send promised materials, and updates next steps

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automatically sends thank-you emails with meeting summaries after sales meetings, creates tasks for promised materials, and updates next steps in CRM.

keySteps: Trigger when meeting logged in calendar or CRM

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → AI Agent (extract meeting notes) → Google Gmail (send thank-you) → HubSpot (create task) → Google Sheets (log activity)

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are a meeting summary agent. Extract from meeting notes: key_points (array), action_items (array), promised_materials (array), next_steps (string), meeting_summary (string). Return JSON with extracted information.

google_gmail.subject: Thank you for the meeting - {{$json.customerName}}
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.customerName}}, Thank you for meeting with us today. Summary: {{$json.meetingSummary}}. Next steps: {{$json.nextSteps}}. We'll send the promised materials shortly.

actions.purpose: Extract meeting summary and action items

workflows.use_case: Escalation of Critical Support Issues - Notifies support manager, reassigns to senior agent, and posts update in urgent channel when critical tickets unresolved for > 4 hours

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that monitors critical support tickets, automatically escalates to support manager and senior agents if unresolved for more than 4 hours, and posts updates in urgent issues channel.

structure.description: Trigger: schedule (hourly) → Database Read (check critical tickets) → If/Else (unresolved > 4h?) → [True: Reassign + Notify manager + Slack alert]

database_read.query: SELECT ticket_id, customer_name, issue, created_at, assigned_agent FROM tickets WHERE priority = 'Critical' AND status != 'Resolved' AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '4 hours'

google_gmail.subject: 🚨 CRITICAL: Ticket #{{$json.ticketId}} Escalated
google_gmail.body: Ticket #{{$json.ticketId}} has been unresolved for {{$json.hoursUnresolved}} hours. Customer: {{$json.customerName}}. Issue: {{$json.issue}}. Reassigned to senior agent: {{$json.seniorAgent}}.

slack_message.message: 🚨 ESCALATED: Ticket #{{$json.ticketId}} - {{$json.customerName}} - Unresolved for {{$json.hoursUnresolved}}h - Reassigned to {{$json.seniorAgent}}

workflows.use_case: Customer Satisfaction Survey Trigger - Sends NPS survey 30 days after product delivery, logs responses, requests referrals from promoters, and creates follow-up tasks for detractors

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automatically sends NPS surveys 30 days after product delivery, logs responses in CRM, requests referrals from promoters, and creates follow-up tasks for detractors.

keySteps: Schedule check for deliveries 30 days ago

structure.description: Trigger: schedule (daily) → Database Read (find 30-day deliveries) → Google Gmail (send NPS) → Wait for response → HubSpot (log) → If/Else (promoter/detractor?) → [Promoter: Request referral, Detractor: Create task]

database_read.query: SELECT customer_id, customer_name, email, delivery_date FROM orders WHERE delivery_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND survey_sent = false

google_gmail.subject: How likely are you to recommend us?
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.customerName}}, We'd love your feedback! On a scale of 0-10, how likely are you to recommend us? [Survey Link]

workflows.use_case: Account Management Review - Gathers usage stats, prepares quarterly business review report, schedules meeting with customer, and reminds account manager

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automatically prepares quarterly business reviews by gathering usage statistics, generating reports, scheduling meetings with customers, and reminding account managers.

structure.description: Trigger: schedule (weekly check) → Database Read (usage stats) → AI Agent (generate report) → Google Sheets (prepare QBR) → Google Calendar (schedule meeting) → Google Gmail (remind manager)

database_read.query: SELECT customer_id, usage_stats, active_users, feature_usage FROM accounts WHERE qbr_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '7 days'

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are a QBR report generator. Analyze usage statistics and generate a quarterly business review summary with: key_metrics (object), trends (array), recommendations (array), report_summary (string). Return JSON with QBR data.

google_gmail.subject: QBR Reminder - {{$json.customerName}}
google_gmail.body: QBR for {{$json.customerName}} is scheduled for {{$json.qbrDate}}. Report prepared. Meeting scheduled with customer.

workflows.use_case: Offer Letter Approval and Generation - Generates offer letter using salary/start date data, routes for approval, emails to candidate and DocuSign when approved

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that generates offer letters from candidate data, routes them for approval, and once approved, emails to candidate and sends via DocuSign for signature.

keySteps: Trigger when candidate ready for offer

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → JavaScript (generate offer letter) → Airtable (create approval request) → If/Else (approved?) → [True: Google Gmail (email) + HTTP Request (DocuSign)]

google_gmail.subject: Offer Letter - {{$json.position}}
google_gmail.body: {{$json.offerLetter}}

workflows.use_case: Sales Order Processing - Verifies inventory, creates invoice, notifies finance, and updates opportunity to Closed Won when order received

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that processes sales orders by verifying inventory availability, creating invoices, notifying finance team, and updating opportunity status to Closed Won.

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → Database Read (check inventory) → If/Else (available?) → [True: Create invoice + Notify finance + Update opportunity, False: Notify sales]

database_read.query: SELECT product_id, quantity_available FROM inventory WHERE product_id = $1

google_gmail.subject: New Invoice Created - {{$json.invoiceNumber}}
google_gmail.body: Invoice {{$json.invoiceNumber}} has been created for order {{$json.orderId}}. Customer: {{$json.customerName}}. Total: ${{$json.total}}.

slack_message.message: ✅ Order Processed: {{$json.orderId}} - Invoice {{$json.invoiceNumber}} - ${{$json.total}} - Opportunity Closed Won

workflows.use_case: Upsell/Cross-sell Opportunity Detection - Checks customer's current products after deal closed won, recommends complementary items, and creates follow-up task

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that detects upsell and cross-sell opportunities by checking customer's current products after a deal is closed won, recommending complementary items, and creating follow-up tasks for sales reps.

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → Database Read (customer products) → AI Agent (recommend products) → HubSpot (create task) → Google Calendar (schedule follow-up)

database_read.query: SELECT product_id, product_name FROM customer_products WHERE customer_id = $1

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are an upsell/cross-sell recommendation agent. Analyze customer's current products and the recently closed deal. Recommend complementary products that would add value. Return JSON with: recommended_products (array), upsell_opportunities (array), cross_sell_opportunities (array), recommendation_reason (string), estimated_value (number).

workflows.use_case: Sales Performance Alert - Updates sales dashboard, notifies team on Slack/Teams when deal closed won/lost, and triggers loss-reason survey if lost

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that monitors deal closures, updates sales dashboard, notifies team on Slack/Teams, and triggers loss-reason surveys when deals are lost.

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → HubSpot (get deal) → Google Sheets (update dashboard) → Slack (notify) → If/Else (lost?) → [True: Send loss-reason survey]

google_gmail.subject: Loss Reason Survey - {{$json.dealName}}
google_gmail.body: We noticed deal {{$json.dealName}} was marked as lost. Please help us understand why: [Survey Link]

workflows.use_case: Marketing Campaign Lead Handoff - Scores leads from whitepaper downloads or webinars, assigns to SDR if score above threshold, and notifies them

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that scores leads from marketing campaigns (whitepaper downloads, webinars), assigns qualified leads to sales development reps if score exceeds threshold, and notifies the assigned SDR.

keySteps: Trigger when lead downloads whitepaper or attends webinar

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → AI Agent (score lead) → If/Else (score > threshold?) → [True: Assign to SDR + Notify, False: Add to nurture]

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are a lead scoring agent. Score leads based on: activity_type (whitepaper|webinar), engagement_level, company_size, job_title, industry. Return JSON with: lead_score (0-100), is_qualified (boolean, score >= 70), recommended_action (assign_to_sdr|nurture), sdr_assignment (string).

google_gmail.subject: New Qualified Lead Assigned - {{$json.leadName}}
google_gmail.body: Lead {{$json.leadName}} has been assigned to you. Score: {{$json.lead_score}}. Activity: {{$json.activity}}. Company: {{$json.company}}.

workflows.use_case: Event Registration and Follow-up - Sends confirmation, calendar invite, reminder emails for webinars/events, and post-event sends recording and connects to CRM

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automates event registration by sending confirmations, calendar invites, reminder emails, and post-event sends recordings and connects activity to CRM.

keySteps: Trigger when contact registers for event
Post-event: Send recording and log to CRM

structure.description: Trigger: form → Google Gmail (confirmation) → Google Calendar (invite) → Schedule (reminders) → Post-event: Google Gmail (recording) + HubSpot (log activity)

google_gmail.subject: Event Registration Confirmed - {{$json.eventName}}
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.name}}, Your registration for {{$json.eventName}} is confirmed. Event Date: {{$json.eventDate}}. Join Link: {{$json.joinLink}}

workflows.use_case: Performance Review Cycle - Sends self-assessment form to employee, notifies manager to complete review, schedules review meeting, and stores final review in HRIS

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automates performance review cycles by sending self-assessment forms to employees, notifying managers to complete reviews, scheduling review meetings, and storing final reviews in HRIS.

structure.description: Trigger: schedule (check review dates) → Database Read (find due reviews) → Google Gmail (send forms) → Google Calendar (schedule meeting) → Airtable (store review)

database_read.query: SELECT employee_id, employee_name, email, manager_email, review_date FROM employees WHERE review_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '7 days'

google_gmail.subject: Performance Review - Self Assessment Due
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.employeeName}}, Your performance review is scheduled for {{$json.reviewDate}}. Please complete your self-assessment: [Form Link]

workflows.use_case: Contract Generation and E-signature - Generates contract from template when opportunity moves to Contract Negotiation, sends via e-signature tool, and saves signed copy to CRM

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that generates contracts from templates using opportunity data when deal moves to Contract Negotiation stage, sends via e-signature tool, and saves signed copies to CRM.

keySteps: Trigger when opportunity moves to Contract Negotiation

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → JavaScript (generate contract) → HTTP Request (send to DocuSign) → HubSpot (update status) → Google Drive (save signed copy)

workflows.use_case: Customer Portal Access Request - Verifies email domain, creates portal account, sends welcome email with login instructions, and notifies account manager

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that processes customer portal access requests by verifying email domain, creating portal accounts, sending welcome emails with login instructions, and notifying account managers.

keySteps: Receive portal access request via form

structure.description: Trigger: form → Database Read (verify domain) → If/Else (verified?) → [True: Create account + Send welcome, False: Reject] → Notify manager

database_read.query: SELECT customer_id, company_domain FROM customers WHERE company_domain = $1

google_gmail.subject: Welcome to Customer Portal
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.name}}, Your portal account has been created. Username: {{$json.email}}. Temporary password: {{$json.portalPassword}}. Login: {{$json.portalUrl}}

slack_message.message: ✅ Portal Access: {{$json.name}} ({{$json.company}}) - Account created and welcome email sent

workflows.use_case: Job Requisition Approval - Routes new job requisitions to department head and HR for approval, posts to job boards if approved, and notifies recruiter

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that processes job requisitions by routing them to department head and HR for approval, posting to job boards if approved, and notifying recruiters.

keySteps: Receive job requisition from hiring manager
Route to department head for approval
If approved: Post to job boards

structure.description: Trigger: form → Airtable (create requisition) → Google Gmail (send to dept head) → Wait → If/Else (dept approved?) → Google Gmail (send to HR) → Wait → If/Else (HR approved?) → [True: Post to job boards + Notify recruiter]

google_gmail.subject: Job Requisition Approval Required - {{$json.position}}
google_gmail.body: A new job requisition for {{$json.position}} in {{$json.department}} requires your approval. Budget: ${{$json.budget}}. [Approve] [Reject]

slack_message.message: ✅ Job Requisition Approved: {{$json.position}} - Posted to job boards - Assigned to {{$json.recruiter}}

workflows.use_case: Training Enrollment Approval - Verifies budget with manager, enrolls employee in training course, books travel if needed, and adds certification expiry to calendar

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that processes training enrollment requests by verifying budget with manager, enrolling employees, booking travel if needed, and tracking certification expiry dates.

structure.description: Trigger: form → Database Read (check budget) → If/Else (budget available?) → [True: Enroll + Book travel + Calendar, False: Notify]

database_read.query: SELECT training_budget, remaining_budget FROM departments WHERE department_id = $1

google_gmail.subject: Training Enrollment Confirmed - {{$json.courseName}}
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.employeeName}}, You have been enrolled in {{$json.courseName}} on {{$json.courseDate}}. {{$json.needsTravel ? 'Travel has been booked.' : ''}}

workflows.use_case: Exit Interview Process - Schedules exit interview with HR, collects company assets checklist, revokes system access, and sends offboarding tasks to IT

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automates exit interview processes by scheduling interviews with HR, collecting asset checklists, revoking system access, and sending offboarding tasks to IT.

structure.description: Trigger: webhook → Airtable (create exit record) → Google Calendar (schedule interview) → Google Gmail (send checklist) → Google Sheets (IT tasks) → Slack (notify IT)

google_gmail.subject: Exit Interview Scheduled - {{$json.employeeName}}
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.employeeName}}, Your exit interview is scheduled for {{$json.interviewDate}}. Please return company assets: laptop, badge, keys. Checklist: [Link]

slack_message.message: 🔒 Offboarding: {{$json.employeeName}} - Revoke access by {{$json.lastDay}}. Employee ID: {{$json.employeeId}}

workflows.use_case: Expense Report Approval - Validates receipts, checks policy compliance, routes to manager for approval, then to finance for reimbursement

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that processes expense reports by validating receipts, checking policy compliance, routing to manager for approval, and then to finance for reimbursement.

structure.description: Trigger: form → AI Agent (validate receipts) → If/Else (compliant?) → [True: Send to manager] → If/Else (approved?) → [True: Send to finance]

ai_agent.systemPrompt: You are an expense validation agent. Validate receipts match expenses, check policy compliance (amount limits, categories, dates). Return JSON with: receipts_valid (boolean), policy_compliant (boolean), total_valid (boolean), validation_errors (array), approved_for_review (boolean).

google_gmail.subject: Expense Report Approval - {{$json.employeeName}}
google_gmail.body: Expense report from {{$json.employeeName}} requires your approval. Total: ${{$json.totalAmount}}. [Approve] [Reject]

workflows.use_case: Data Sync Between Systems - Syncs customer data between CRM and database, updates records, and logs sync activity

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that syncs data between different systems like CRM and database, updates records, and logs sync activity.

structure.description: Trigger: schedule → Database Read (source) → JavaScript (transform) → HubSpot (update) → Database Write (destination) → Google Sheets (log)

database_read.query: SELECT customer_id, name, email, phone, company FROM customers WHERE updated_at > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'

database_write.query: INSERT INTO crm_sync_log (customer_id, sync_date, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

workflows.goal: extract data from google sheets and create records
workflows.use_case: Extract Data from Google Sheets and Create Records - Reads data from Google Sheets, processes each row, and creates records in CRM or database

step1.userPrompt: extract data from google sheets and create records

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that extracts data from Google Sheets, processes each row, and creates corresponding records in CRM or database systems.

requirements.primaryGoal: extract data from google sheets and create records

structure.description: Trigger: schedule → Google Sheets (read) → Loop (process each row) → HubSpot (create contact) → Google Sheets (log)

workflows.use_case: Send Notification to Slack - Sends notifications to Slack channels based on triggers, with customizable messages and formatting

step3.systemPrompt: Create a simple workflow that sends notifications to Slack channels with customizable messages and formatting.

structure.description: Trigger: manual_trigger → Slack Message (send notification)

workflows.goal: save form data to google sheets
workflows.use_case: Save Form Data to Google Sheets - Captures form submissions and automatically saves data to Google Sheets for tracking and analysis

step1.userPrompt: save form data to google sheets

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that captures form submissions and automatically saves the data to Google Sheets for tracking and analysis.

requirements.primaryGoal: save form data to google sheets

structure.description: Trigger: form → Google Sheets (append data)

workflows.use_case: Form Submission Sends Confirmation Email - Sends automated confirmation emails to users after they submit forms

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that automatically sends confirmation emails to users after they submit forms.

structure.description: Trigger: form → Google Gmail (send confirmation)

google_gmail.subject: Thank you for contacting us
google_gmail.body: Dear {{$json.name}}, Thank you for your submission. We have received your message and will get back to you soon.

workflows.use_case: Read Data from Google Sheets - Reads and processes data from Google Sheets for analysis or further processing

step3.systemPrompt: Create a workflow that reads data from Google Sheets for analysis or further processing.

structure.description: Trigger: manual_trigger → Google Sheets (read) → Log Output (display data)
